reasoning.research_depth: Covers actual academic papers with genuine understanding. Provides context and explains significance of research findings.
reasoning.signal_noise: Good content density in short format. Some repetitive enthusiasm and catchphrases add minor noise but overall efficient.
reasoning.originality: Distinctive format summarizing cutting-edge research papers accessibly. The consistent enthusiasm and short format are recognizable.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Mixed longevity. Individual paper summaries may become outdated as fields advance, but the educational approach to understanding research persists.
